headline: DexCom Reports Positive CONNECT Data for Non-Insulin Diabetes
summary: DXCM reports positive CONNECT trial results as Dexcom G7 improves HbA1c and time in range in adults with Type 2 diabetes not using insulin.

headline: Here's Why You Should Retain Merit Medical Stock in Your Portfolio Now
summary: MMSI leans on therapeutic strength, an oncology acquisition and a new stent launch, but tariffs, OEM weakness and China pressure shadow 2026.

headline: NTRA & CytoDyn Partner to Advance ctDNA-Guided Development in mCRC
summary: Natera teams with CytoDyn to track ctDNA in CLOVER Phase 2, using Signatera to map leronlimab response in metastatic colorectal cancer.

raw.headline: NTRA & CytoDyn Partner to Advance ctDNA-Guided Development in mCRC
raw.summary: Natera teams with CytoDyn to track ctDNA in CLOVER Phase 2, using Signatera to map leronlimab response in metastatic colorectal cancer.
